name: aep-orchestration-lab
description: AEP Orchestration Lab – decisioning, profile tools, and vendored prototypes

scripts.profile-viewer: cd "aep-prototypes/AEP Profile/03 Profile Viewer" && npm start
scripts.profile-viewer:install: cd "aep-prototypes/AEP Profile/00 Adobe Auth" && npm install && cd "../03 Profile Viewer" && npm install
scripts.build:edp: cd "web/profile-viewer/experience-decisioning-playground" && npm install && npm run build
